    I

    Income - Class in model
    Represents an income entry in the budget tracking system.
    Income() - Constructor for class model.Income
    Default constructor for serialization.
    Income(String, BigDecimal, LocalDate, String, boolean, String, int) - Constructor for class model.Income
    Constructs a new income entry with the specified details.
    IncomeTracker - Class in model
    Implementation of the Tracker interface for managing income entries.
    IncomeTrackingController - Class in controller
    Controller class for the Income Tracking interface.
    IncomeTrackingController() - Constructor for class controller.IncomeTrackingController
     
    initialize() - Method in class controller.Dashboard
    Initializes the dashboard view, loading data from various trackers and setting up UI components.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.BudgetingAnalysis
    Initializes the controller class.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.ExpenseTrackerController
    Initializes the controller class.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.IncomeTrackingController
    Initializes the controller class.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.Reminders
    Initializes the controller.
    interfaces - package interfaces
     
    isCompleted() - Method in class model.Reminder
    Checks if this reminder has been completed.
    isRecurring() - Method in class model.Expense
    Checks if the expense is recurring.
    isRecurring() - Method in class model.Income
    Checks if the income is recurring.
    isUserLoggedIn() - Static method in class model.SystemManager
    Checks if a user is currently logged in.
